mapper.select: SELECT ao.order_sn, ai.title AS audio_title, ai.cover_path AS cover_url, ao.pay_amount, CASE ao.pay_status WHEN 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN 2 THEN '已支付' WHEN 3 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知状态' END AS status, ao.create_time FROM audio_order ao INNER JOIN audio_info ai ON ao.audio_id = ai.id WHERE ao.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ao.create_time DESC
